name: mcp-server-madeonsol
description: Real-time Solana memecoin trading intelligence — track 1,000+ KOL wallets with <3s latency, score 6,700+ Pump.fun deployers, surface multi-KOL coordination signals, run server-side copy-trade rules, and stream every DEX trade across 9+ programs. Backtested first-touch scout signal (S-tier scouts attract ≥3 follow-on KOLs ~50% of the time vs 14% baseline). Free tier 200 requests per day; auth via msk_ API key or x402 micropayments.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_feed
tools.description: Real-time Solana KOL trade feed from 1,000+ tracked wallets.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_coordination
tools.description: Multi-KOL convergence with 0-100 score, peak-density window, exits.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_first_touches
tools.description: First-KOL-touch events — backtested scout signal, filter by tier S/A/B/C.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_leaderboard
tools.description: KOL PnL + win-rate rankings over today, 7d, 30d, 90d, 180d.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_pairs
tools.description: KOL affinity matrix — which KOLs co-trade the same tokens.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_hot_tokens
tools.description: KOL momentum tokens — accelerating buy interest.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_trending_tokens
tools.description: Tokens ranked by KOL buy volume across 5m–12h windows.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_token_entry_order
tools.description: Ranked KOL first-buyers for a specific token.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_compare_wallets
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2-5 KOL wallets with overlap analysis.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_alerts_recent
tools.description: Unified live KOL alert feed: clusters, fresh buys, heating-up wallets.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_pnl
tools.description: Deep per-wallet PnL: equity curve, risk metrics, closed + open positions.

tools.name: madeonsol_kol_timing
tools.description: KOL entry/exit timing profile — average hold, win rate by hour.

tools.name: madeonsol_deployer_alerts
tools.description: Pump.fun deployer alerts with KOL enrichment, filter by tier.

tools.name: madeonsol_deployer_trajectory
tools.description: Deployer skill curve — streaks, rolling bond rate, trend.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_leaderboard
tools.description: Top profitable early-buyer wallets — 47,000+ scored, up to 500 on ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_wallet
tools.description: Full alpha profile + bot-signal flags for one wallet.

tools.name: madeonsol_alpha_linked
tools.description: Behaviorally linked wallets (co-bought 3+ tokens within 2s).

tools.name: madeonsol_tokens_list
tools.description: Filtered token directory — MC band, liquidity, MEV-share, velocity, primary DEX, authority flags.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_get
tools.description: Single token detail — MC, holders, velocity, MEV-share, history age.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_batch
tools.description: Bulk token detail fetch — up to 50 mints per call.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_cap_table
tools.description: First non-deployer early buyers for a token, enriched with PnL/KOL/bot flags.

tools.name: madeonsol_token_buyer_quality
tools.description: 0-100 buyer-quality score for a token's first-buyer cohort.

tools.name: madeonsol_tokens_batch_buyer_quality
tools.description: Bulk buyer-quality scoring — up to 50 mints per call.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_watchlist
tools.description: List tracked wallets and remaining capacity (Free 10 / Pro 50 / Ultra 100).

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_add
tools.description: Add a wallet to your watchlist with optional label.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_remove
tools.description: Remove a wallet from your watchlist.

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_trades
tools.description: Historical swap/transfer events for watched wallets (120-day retention).

tools.name: madeonsol_wallet_tracker_summary
tools.description: Per-wallet stats: swap counts, SOL bought/sold, last event.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_list
tools.description: List your copy-trade rules.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_create
tools.description: Create a copy-trade rule with webhook + WS delivery (HMAC-signed).

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_get
tools.description: Get one copy-trade rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_update
tools.description: Update or toggle a copy-trade rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_delete
tools.description: Delete a copy-trade rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_copytrade_signals
tools.description: Recent fired copy-trade signals (up to 7 days, 1-500).

tools.name: madeonsol_coordination_alerts_list
tools.description: List your KOL coordination alert rules (PRO=5, ULTRA=20).

tools.name: madeonsol_coordination_alerts_create
tools.description: Create a coordination alert rule — pg_notify push, sub-second delivery.

tools.name: madeonsol_coordination_alerts_get
tools.description: Get one coordination alert rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_coordination_alerts_update
tools.description: Update or toggle a coordination alert rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_coordination_alerts_delete
tools.description: Delete a coordination alert rule.

tools.name: madeonsol_first_touch_subscriptions_list
tools.description: List your first-touch webhook subscriptions (ULTRA, up to 10).

tools.name: madeonsol_first_touch_subscriptions_create
tools.description: Create a first-touch webhook subscription — push on every S-tier scout buy.

tools.name: madeonsol_first_touch_subscriptions_get
tools.description: Get one first-touch subscription.

tools.name: madeonsol_first_touch_subscriptions_update
tools.description: Update or toggle a first-touch subscription.

tools.name: madeonsol_first_touch_subscriptions_delete
tools.description: Delete a first-touch subscription.

tools.name: madeonsol_create_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook for real-time push notifications (PRO/ULTRA).

tools.name: madeonsol_list_webhooks
tools.description: List your registered webhooks (PRO/ULTRA).

tools.name: madeonsol_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a webhook by ID (PRO/ULTRA).

tools.name: madeonsol_test_webhook
tools.description: Send a test payload to verify a webhook (PRO/ULTRA).

tools.name: madeonsol_stream_token
tools.description: Issue a 24h WebSocket streaming token (Pro/Ultra). Includes dex_ws_url on ULTRA.

tools.name: madeonsol_me
tools.description: Account/quota introspection — tier, remaining requests, per-feature usage.

tools.name: madeonsol_signal_performance
tools.description: Signal performance stats for a named signal — hit rate by bucket, lift over base, sample size, confidence window. Supported: dump_cluster_count, runner_rate.

tools.name: madeonsol_discovery
tools.description: List all available endpoints with x402 prices (free, no auth).
